LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF SEQUOIA DUNKINSELL'S MOTION FOR ATTORNEY'S FEES IS CONTINUED TO MAY 30, 2012 PER THE AMENDED NOTICE. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN, REPORTER: LAVENA WARD, CSR #7077
OPPOSITION TO MOTIONS FOR ATTYS FEES AND COSTS FILED BY DEFENDANT CYPRESS SECURITY, LLC

LAW AND MOTION 302, A R G U E D; PLAINTIFF SEQUOIA DUNKINSELL'S (AMENDED) MOTION FOR ATTORNEYS' FEES IS GRANTED IN PART. DEFENDANT MUST PAY $15,000 AS REASONABLE FEES TO PLAINTIFF. THE FEES WERE REDUCED BECAUSE PLAINTIFF IS NOT ENTITLED TO FEES INCURRED AFTER THE 998 OFFER BASED ON THE EXPRESS TERMS OF THE COMPROMISE, THE BILLING ENTRIES FOR CLIENT AND CO-COUNSEL CONFERENCES WERE EXCESSIVE, AND THE PLAINTIFF ACHIEVED VERY LIMITED SUCCESS. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: HAROLD E. KAHN; COURT REPORTER: LAVENA WARD CSR #7077

CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Sep-14-2012 Off Calendar

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar May-30-2012 Off Calendar

MEDIATION ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar May-30-2012 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Oct-02-12 At 02:00 P.M. In Dept 610

(Amended) Notice Of Motion And Motion To Continued Hearing Date For Motion For Attorneys Fees
Off Calendar May-30-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. ANDREW LEE YOUNKINS, TEL. NO. (518) 542-0861 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF;
ATTY. TYREEN G. TORNER OF FOX ROTHSCHILD LLP, TEL. NO. 364-5559 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANTS.

RULING - A R G U E D; PLAINTIFF SEQUOIA DUNKINSELL'S (Amended) Motion For Attorneys' Fees is Granted in part. Defendant must pay $15,000 as reasonable fees to plaintiff. The fees were reduced because plaintiff is not entitled to fees incurred after the 998 offer based on the express terms of the compromise, the billing entries for client and co-counsel conferences were excessive, and the plaintiff achieved very limited success. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Harold E. Kahn; Court Reporter: LaVena Ward CSR #7077 =302/HK

Mtn To Recover Costs Of Personal Service
Off Calendar May-30-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. ANDREW LEE YOUNKINS, TEL. NO. (518) 542-0861 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF;
ATTY. TYREEN G. TORNER OF FOX ROTHSCHILD LLP, TEL. NO. 364-5559 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANTS.

RULING - THE MATTER WAS NOT ARGUED. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF SEQUOIA DUNKINSELL'S Motion To Recover Costs of ($728.53) Of Personal Service IS Granted. No opposition filed. = ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Harold E. Kahn; Court Reporter: LaVena Ward CSR #7077 (302/HEK)

Ntc Of Motion And Motion For Atty'S Fees
